title: Piscator
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Piscator.jpg|thumb]]
'''Piscators''' were large, [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] predators native to [[Alluuvia]]. They grew stronger from the fears of their prey.

==Appearances==
*[[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']]

[[Category:Aquatic creatures]]
[[Category:Creatures of the Elrood sector]]
[[Category:Creatures of unspecified biology]]
[[Category:Force-sensitive creatures]]
[[Category:Predatory creatures]]
[[Category:Species of undefined sentience]]
